title: trigonostemon verticillatus
intro: Trigonostemon verticillatus, also known as the Chinese milkwort, is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. Trigonostemon verticillatus is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine for its purported therapeutic properties.
